results.public_title: 8005 Zürich - CHF 1’350 incl. utilities per month
results.pitch_title: Rent a room in a shared flat in Zürich
results.description:
**Bright and cozy furnished room (18m2) with huge window, in the new trend quarter Westside on Eschwerwyssplatz. Very centric and yet surprisingly quiet.**  
  
Our beautiful and very spacious duplex-apartment is located on the 5th floor (with elevator) and is spread over 177m2. You enter the apartment in the 5th flor where you will find the living room, kitchen, dining area, terrace and a guest toilet (with washing machine and tumble dryer). On the lower floor are the 4 bedrooms, 1 bathroom with bathtub, 1 bathroom with shower and also storage room. A huge roof terrace can be reached via an external staircase.  
  
**WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR...**  
A person who fits in with us, shares similar values and is not looking for a functional flat share, but a home. Gender and age are not so important to us, but fairness, respect and warm-hearted interaction do. To share what the day was like while cooking some nice food...  
  
We mainly are vegetarians or vegans. Sustainability is important to us, although we are aware that our household is not (yet) completely organic. If you are one step ahead of us, we happily learn from you. Even though we have a cleaning lady come in once a week, we all feel responsible for keeping the place clean and homely.  
  
We all have jobs and are otherwise very busy and committed. Finding a quiet and harmonious home where we can relax from the hustle and bustle outside is therefore important to us all.  
  
**ABOUT US**  
**Minou:** is our 4-year-old shared flat cat. Nobody can get past him! Because he loves jumping on your legs, being stroked and getting attention. And at some point he melts everyone's heart...  
  
**Sil**: I've lived in this apartment for half an eternity and could tell so many stories about the different people from different nations and languages who have lived here with me and my daughter Luna over the last 18 years, bringing the spirit and culinary recipes of the world with them. I am an open minded and curious person, both professionally and personally. As a filmmaker and depth psychology hypnotherapist, I am equally fascinated by journeys into the outer and inner worlds and am a passionate explorer of all things metaphysical. I love cooking and eating together with loved ones, chatting, laughing and exchanging ideas just as much. I also love to immerse myself in a good book, go to the movies or do some crafts in the rustico in Ticino.  
  
**Luna:** I was lucky enough to grow up in this beautiful apartment. I'll be 19 this year and I have a lot on my plate at the moment, as I'm currently working as a trainee in a daycare center, practicing driving and also enjoy meeting up with friends. I'm also a bit of an introvert some times and love having my own room as a quiet retreat. In my free time, I like to dance, do yoga and Pilates and occasionally also love to cook something (hopefully) tasty. I'll be traveling for four months from April, but I'm looking forward to hopefully getting to know you a bit before.  
  
**Savina:** Even though I'm not quite young anymore (47 years old), I'm the baby of the flat share. I've lived here since I moved to Zurich in November 2024 and have felt welcome and at home from day one.I am a trained psychiatric nurse and kinesiologist, but I am also in a "reorientation phase" professionally.  
  
I would describe myself as a down-to-earth and spiritual person. Open, honest and respectful communication is very important to me.I enjoy moments of retreat.But I also really enjoy spontaneous conversations, having a coffee (or something else) together or eating together from time to time. It's not forced, but because my flatmates have a similar idea of living together.  
I also love doing sports (hiking, climbing, jogging, cycling, dancing....), being out in the fresh air and enjoying all that Zurich has to offer.  
  
**Does this appeal to you?**  
Then we would be delighted if you could write us a few lines telling us more about yourself and what is important to you in living together.
results.rent_title: Rent a room in a shared flat in Zürich

\- Leuchtreklamen stehen ebenfalls zur Miete zur Verfügung

\- über 200 öffentliche Parkplätze in der Tiefgarage des Einkaufszentrums   
  
Haben wir Ihr Interesse geweckt?   
Gerne stehen wir Ihnen für eine unverbindliche Besichtigung und Fragen zur Verfügung.

results.description_title: Ihr neuer Firmenstandort - bei uns passt alles!
results.description:
Wir haben den Standort - Sie den Erfolg! Der aktuelle Innenausbau eignet sich besonders für Anbieter im Bereich Dienstleistung (Büro), Ausstellung, Schulung/Beratung, Praxis etc. Profitieren Sie von: 

  


  * der steuergünstigen Gemeinde Muri-Gümligen 
  * der hervorragenden Anbindung an die regionalen und nationalen Verkehrsnetze 
  * sowie dem Flughafen Bern-Belp, welcher lediglich 15 Fahrminuten vom Standort entfernt liegt 



  


Hinter einer eleganten Glasfassade erwarten Sie hochwertige Mietflächen. Die hellen und attraktiven Flächen, lassen sich bequem über das offene Treppenhaus oder den Personenlift (rollstuhlgängig) erreichen. Der 6-geschossige Büroturm wurde 2011 komplett saniert und mit neuer, moderner Gebäudetechnik ausgestattet. 

Das repräsentative Büro-/Gewerbehaus besteht aus zwei Gebäudeteilen mit einem gemeinsamen Haupteingang auf der Nordwestseite an der Worbstrasse. Der Zwischentrakt mit bedientem Empfangsbereich, Foyer sowie einladender Cafeteria verbinden die Gebäude miteinander. Dienstleistungen wie Empfang, Post, Sitzungszimmer, Cafeteria können nach Bedarf optional mitbenutzt werden. 

  


Die Nettomietzinse von CHF 150.-, bzw. CHF 170.- pro m2/Jahr (zzgl. NK) im ersten Jahr basiert auf einer 5-jährigen Vertragsdauer und versteht sich als Startpreis einer Staffelung. Auch nach Ablauf der Rabattierung im ersten Jahr können wir Ihnen weiterhin attraktive, individuell auf Ihre Bedürfnisse zugeschnittene Mietzinse anbieten. 

Gerne stehen wir Ihnen für weitere Auskünfte sowie die Vereinbarung eines persönlichen Besichtigungstermins direkt vor Ort gerne zur Verfügung. 

  


Wir garantieren Ihnen bereits heute eine vielversprechende Lage für Ihre Geschäftsidee! 

  


* Die aufgeführten Impressionen (Visualisierungen und Fotos) sind urheberrechtlich geschützt und dürfen nicht von Dritten verwendet werden. Sie können von den Flächen abweichen und sind ohne Gewähr.
